caption: The video features a close-up of a man wearing a traditional hat and glasses, who appears to be speaking or being interviewed. The text overlay indicates that this is a segment from PlusTV Africa's "Plus Politics" program, focusing on a statement attributed to Bola Tinubu, which reads, "Nigeria Needs Me." The setting seems formal, possibly a news studio or an event, with a blurred background that suggests an indoor environment. The man's expression and posture convey a sense of seriousness and contemplation, aligning with the political nature of the content. The video also includes a website link for viewers to watch the content online, emphasizing its accessibility and relevance to current political discussions in Nigeria.
